_doc: Validate the loveTest sweep winner (ens_768_896_1024) on all 9 clips. Hypothesis: adding imgsz=896 closes a medium-scale gap on close-contact pairs in loveTest (+0.007 IDF1, -192 FN) without regressing on other clips. Also tests stacking with the v9 dark-recovery profile (CLAHE + gamma=auto) to see if the two wins compose.
